get_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_listi.desc_en: Return the full list of app categories available on Google Play for app-listing searches.
get_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_listi.description_zh: 返回 Google Play 上可用于应用列表检索的全部应用分类。

post_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_list.heading_zh: 实时检索 Google Play 应用列表 post_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_listings_search_live
post_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_list.desc_en: Search Google Play app listings in real time (Live mode) and return apps with ID, icon, reviews count, rating, price, and more in the same response.
post_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_list.description_zh: 以实时（Live）方式检索 Google Play 应用列表，在同一响应中返回应用的 ID、图标、评论数、评分、价格等信息。

get_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_revie.heading_zh: 获取 Google Play 评论任务结果（Advanced） get_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_reviews_task_get_advanced_id
get_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_revie.desc_en: Collect the structured (advanced) results of a completed Google Play App Reviews task by its `id`, including review ratings and content.
get_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_revie.description_zh: 按任务 `id` 收取已完成 Google Play 评论任务的结构化（advanced）结果，含评论评分与内容。

post_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_revi.heading_zh: 提交 Google Play 评论任务 post_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_reviews_task_post
post_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_revi.desc_en: Queue a Google Play App Reviews task for the app given in `app_id`. Returns a task `id` to collect later.
post_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_revi.description_zh: 为 `app_id` 指定的应用排队提交 Google Play 评论任务。返回任务 `id`，稍后收取。

get_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_searc.heading_zh: 获取 Google Play 关键词搜索任务结果（Advanced） get_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_searches_task_get_advanced_id
get_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_searc.desc_en: Collect the structured (advanced) results of a completed Google Play App Searches task by its `id`, listing apps ranking for the posted keyword.
get_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_searc.description_zh: 按任务 `id` 收取已完成 Google Play 关键词搜索任务的结构化（advanced）结果，列出对应关键词下排名的应用。

get_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_searc.heading_zh: 获取 Google Play 关键词搜索任务结果（HTML） get_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_searches_task_get_html_id
get_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_searc.desc_en: Collect the raw HTML results of a completed Google Play App Searches task by its `id`.
get_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_searc.description_zh: 按任务 `id` 收取已完成 Google Play 关键词搜索任务的原始 HTML 结果。

post_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_sear.heading_zh: 提交 Google Play 关键词搜索任务 post_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_searches_task_post
post_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_sear.desc_en: Queue a Google Play App Searches task that returns apps ranking for a keyword. Returns a task `id`.
post_dataforseo_app_data_google_app_sear.description_zh: 排队提交 Google Play 关键词搜索任务，返回某关键词下排名的应用。返回任务 `id`。

get_dataforseo_app_data_google_categorie.heading_zh: 列出 Google Play 应用分类 get_dataforseo_app_data_google_categories
get_dataforseo_app_data_google_categorie.desc_en: Return the full list of app categories available on Google Play.
get_dataforseo_app_data_google_categorie.description_zh: 返回 Google Play 上可用的全部应用分类。

get_dataforseo_app_data_google_languages.heading_zh: 列出 App Data Google 支持的语言 get_dataforseo_app_data_google_languages
get_dataforseo_app_data_google_languages.desc_en: Return the list of Google languages supported by the App Data API.
get_dataforseo_app_data_google_languages.description_zh: 返回 App Data API 支持的 Google 语言列表。

get_dataforseo_app_data_google_locations.heading_zh: 列出 App Data Google 支持的地区 get_dataforseo_app_data_google_locations
get_dataforseo_app_data_google_locations.desc_en: Return the list of Google locations supported by the App Data API.
get_dataforseo_app_data_google_locations.description_zh: 返回 App Data API 支持的 Google 地区列表。

id.desc_en: Task identifier (UUID) returned when posting a task; use it with the matching Task GET endpoint to collect the results within the task retention window.
id.title_zh: 提交任务时返回的任务标识（UUID）；在任务保留期内用它调用对应的 Task GET 接口收取结果。

id.desc_en: Task identifier (UUID) returned when posting a task; use it with the matching Task GET endpoint to collect the results within the task retention window.
id.title_zh: 提交任务时返回的任务标识（UUID）；在任务保留期内用它调用对应的 Task GET 接口收取结果。

asin.desc_en: Amazon Standard Identification Number (ASIN) of the product to look up. Obtain it from the Amazon Products endpoint; ASINs are assigned dynamically by Amazon (e.g. `B085RFFC9Q`).
asin.title_zh: 要查询商品的 Amazon 标准识别号（ASIN）。可通过 Amazon Products 接口获取；ASIN 由 Amazon 动态分配（如 `B085RFFC9Q`）。

priority.desc_en: Execution priority of the task: `1` normal (default), `2` high. High priority speeds up processing but incurs additional charges.
priority.title_zh: 任务执行优先级：`1` 普通（默认），`2` 高。高优先级加速处理但会额外计费。

location_name.desc_en: Full location name for the search engine (e.g. `London,England,United Kingdom`). Use this when not setting `location_code`/`location_coordinate`; fetch valid values from the corresponding locations endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 搜索引擎地区的完整名称（如 `London,England,United Kingdom`）。未设 `location_code`/`location_coordinate` 时使用；可调对应 locations 接口获取可用取值。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric location code for the search engine (e.g. `9045969`). Use this when not setting `location_name`/`location_coordinate`; fetch valid values from the corresponding locations endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 搜索引擎地区的数字代码（如 `9045969`）。未设 `location_name`/`location_coordinate` 时使用；可调对应 locations 接口获取可用取值。

location_coordinate.desc_en: GPS coordinates as `latitude,longitude,radius` (e.g. `53.476225,-2.243572,200`). Use instead of `location_name`/`location_code`; latitude/longitude allow up to 7 decimals and radius must be at least 199.9.
location_coordinate.title_zh: GPS 坐标，格式 `纬度,经度,半径`（如 `53.476225,-2.243572,200`）。可替代 `location_name`/`location_code`；经纬度最多 7 位小数，半径下限 199.9。

language_name.desc_en: Full language name for the search engine (e.g. `English (United Kingdom)`). Use when not setting `language_code`; fetch valid values from the corresponding languages endpoint.
language_name.title_zh: 搜索引擎语言的完整名称（如 `English (United Kingdom)`）。未设 `language_code` 时使用；可调对应 languages 接口获取可用取值。

language_code.desc_en: Language code for the search engine (e.g. `en_GB` for Amazon, `en` for app stores). Use when not setting `language_name`; fetch valid values from the corresponding languages endpoint.
language_code.title_zh: 搜索引擎语言代码（Amazon 如 `en_GB`，应用商店如 `en`）。未设 `language_name` 时使用；可调对应 languages 接口获取可用取值。

se_domain.desc_en: Custom search-engine domain (e.g. `amazon.co.uk`, `google.de`). Optional — by default the relevant domain is chosen automatically from the location and language.
se_domain.title_zh: 自定义搜索引擎域名（如 `amazon.co.uk`、`google.de`）。可选——默认会按地区与语言自动选择相应域名。

tag.desc_en: User-defined task label (up to 255 chars) echoed back in the response `data` object, so you can match results to the task you posted.
tag.title_zh: 用户自定义任务标签（上限 255 字符），会在响应 `data` 对象中回显，便于将结果与所提交任务对应。

postback_url.desc_en: Callback URL to which a gzip-compressed POST with the task results is sent once the task completes. Supports `$id` and url-encoded `$tag` placeholders that are substituted before sending.
postback_url.title_zh: 任务完成后接收结果的回调 URL，结果以 gzip 压缩经 POST 发送。支持 `$id` 与经 url 编码的 `$tag` 占位符，发送前会被替换。

postback_data.desc_en: Result datatype delivered to `postback_url`; required when `postback_url` is set. Selects which task-result format is pushed (e.g. `advanced`, `html`).
postback_data.title_zh: 推送到 `postback_url` 的结果数据类型；设置 `postback_url` 时必填。决定推送哪种任务结果格式（如 `advanced`、`html`）。

pingback_url.desc_en: Notification URL pinged via GET when the task completes. Supports `$id` and url-encoded `$tag` placeholders substituted before the request is sent.
pingback_url.title_zh: 任务完成时以 GET 通知的回调 URL。支持 `$id` 与经 url 编码的 `$tag` 占位符，请求发送前会被替换。

version.desc_en: Current version of the DataForSEO API that served the response.
version.title_zh: 处理本次响应的 DataForSEO API 当前版本号。

status_code.desc_en: Overall response status code for the request. Use it to detect success vs. error conditions; see the DataForSEO status-code reference for the full list.
status_code.title_zh: 整个请求的总体状态码。用于判断成功或错误；完整列表见 DataForSEO 状态码参考。

status_message.title_zh: 与总体 `status_code` 对应的可读说明信息。

time.desc_en: Total processing time of the request, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 请求的总处理耗时，单位秒。

cost.desc_en: Total cost of all tasks in this response, in USD.
cost.title_zh: 本次响应中所有任务的总费用，单位美元。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of tasks contained in the `tasks` array.
tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中包含的任务数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: Number of tasks in the `tasks` array that returned an error.
tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中返回错误的任务数量。

tasks.desc_en: Array of task objects, each carrying the status and results of one submitted task.
tasks.title_zh: 任务对象数组，每个元素承载一个已提交任务的状态与结果。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique identifier (UUID) of the task within the DataForSEO system.
tasks.id.title_zh: 任务在 DataForSEO 系统中的唯一标识（UUID）。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Per-task status code (range 10000-60000) indicating how this individual task resolved.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 单个任务的状态码（取值 10000-60000），表示该任务的处理结果。

tasks.status_message.title_zh: 该任务 `status_code` 对应的可读说明信息。

tasks.time.desc_en: Processing time of this individual task, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 单个任务的处理耗时，单位秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Cost of this individual task, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 单个任务的费用，单位美元。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's `result` array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: API URL path segments that identify the endpoint this task was routed to.
tasks.path.title_zh: 标识该任务所路由接口的 API URL 路径片段。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters supplied when the task was created (POST body or GET URL parameters).
tasks.data.title_zh: 创建任务时所提供参数的回显（POST 请求体或 GET URL 参数）。

tasks.result.desc_en: Array of result objects for the task. For a just-posted task this is null and is populated once the task completes.
tasks.result.title_zh: 任务的结果对象数组。对刚提交的任务此处为 null，任务完成后才会填充。

country.desc_en: Country ISO code echoed when filtering the locations list by country (e.g. `us`).
country.title_zh: 按国家过滤地区列表时回显的国家 ISO 代码（如 `us`）。

id.desc_en: Task identifier (UUID) returned when posting a task; use it with the matching Task GET endpoint to collect the results within the task retention window.
id.title_zh: 提交任务时返回的任务标识（UUID）；在任务保留期内用它调用对应的 Task GET 接口收取结果。

keyword.desc_en: Search query (product name or app keyword) to run. Up to 700 characters; `%##` sequences are URL-decoded and `+` becomes a space, so encode a literal `%` as `%25` and a literal `+` as `%2B`.
keyword.title_zh: 要检索的搜索词（商品名或应用关键词）。上限 700 字符；`%##` 会被解码、`+` 会被解码为空格，故字面 `%` 写作 `%25`、字面 `+` 写作 `%2B`。

url.desc_en: Direct search-query URL to parse instead of structured parameters. The URL must already encode the exact language and location; this method is the hardest to process and generally not recommended.
url.title_zh: 直接传入搜索查询的 URL，以替代结构化参数。URL 必须已编码确切的语言与地区；此方式处理最复杂，通常不推荐。

priority.desc_en: Execution priority of the task: `1` normal (default), `2` high. High priority speeds up processing but incurs additional charges.
priority.title_zh: 任务执行优先级：`1` 普通（默认），`2` 高。高优先级加速处理但会额外计费。

language_code.desc_en: Language code for the search engine (e.g. `en_GB` for Amazon, `en` for app stores). Use when not setting `language_name`; fetch valid values from the corresponding languages endpoint.
language_code.title_zh: 搜索引擎语言代码（Amazon 如 `en_GB`，应用商店如 `en`）。未设 `language_name` 时使用；可调对应 languages 接口获取可用取值。

se_domain.desc_en: Custom search-engine domain (e.g. `amazon.co.uk`, `google.de`). Optional — by default the relevant domain is chosen automatically from the location and language.
se_domain.title_zh: 自定义搜索引擎域名（如 `amazon.co.uk`、`google.de`）。可选——默认会按地区与语言自动选择相应域名。

depth.desc_en: Parsing depth — how many results/reviews/apps to return. Best set in multiples of the per-page batch size; raising it above one batch may add charges if extra results are returned. Limits vary by endpoint.
depth.title_zh: 解析深度——返回的结果/评论/应用数量。建议设为单页批量的整数倍；超过一个批量时若返回更多结果可能额外计费。上限因接口而异。

max_crawl_pages.desc_en: Maximum number of SERP pages to crawl (up to 7). Works together with `depth` to bound how much of the results page set is retrieved.
max_crawl_pages.title_zh: 最多爬取的 SERP 页数（上限 7）。与 `depth` 协同，共同限定抓取的结果页范围。

department.desc_en: Amazon department to scope product listings to (e.g. `Electronics`, `Books`, `Home & Kitchen`).
department.title_zh: 限定商品列表所属的 Amazon 部门（如 `Electronics`、`Books`、`Home & Kitchen`）。

search_param.desc_en: Extra raw search-URL parameters for fine-grained control (e.g. price bounds, sort order). Ignored if `price_min`, `price_max`, or `sort_by` are also provided.
search_param.title_zh: 用于精细控制的原始搜索 URL 附加参数（如价格区间、排序）。若同时提供了 `price_min`、`price_max` 或 `sort_by`，则会被忽略。

price_min.desc_en: Minimum product price filter for the query (e.g. `5`). When set, `search_param` is ignored.
price_min.title_zh: 查询的商品最低价过滤（如 `5`）。一旦设置，`search_param` 将被忽略。

price_max.desc_en: Maximum product price filter for the query (e.g. `100`). When set, `search_param` is ignored.
price_max.title_zh: 查询的商品最高价过滤（如 `100`）。一旦设置，`search_param` 将被忽略。

sort_by.desc_en: Sorting rule: `relevance`, `price_low_to_high`, `price_high_to_low`, `featured`, `avg_customer_review`, or `newest_arrival`. When set, `search_param` is ignored.
sort_by.title_zh: 排序规则：`relevance`、`price_low_to_high`、`price_high_to_low`、`featured`、`avg_customer_review` 或 `newest_arrival`。设置后 `search_param` 被忽略。

tag.desc_en: User-defined task label (up to 255 chars) echoed back in the response `data` object, so you can match results to the task you posted.
tag.title_zh: 用户自定义任务标签（上限 255 字符），会在响应 `data` 对象中回显，便于将结果与所提交任务对应。

postback_url.desc_en: Callback URL to which a gzip-compressed POST with the task results is sent once the task completes. Supports `$id` and url-encoded `$tag` placeholders that are substituted before sending.
postback_url.title_zh: 任务完成后接收结果的回调 URL，结果以 gzip 压缩经 POST 发送。支持 `$id` 与经 url 编码的 `$tag` 占位符，发送前会被替换。

postback_data.desc_en: Result datatype delivered to `postback_url`; required when `postback_url` is set. Selects which task-result format is pushed (e.g. `advanced`, `html`).
postback_data.title_zh: 推送到 `postback_url` 的结果数据类型；设置 `postback_url` 时必填。决定推送哪种任务结果格式（如 `advanced`、`html`）。

pingback_url.desc_en: Notification URL pinged via GET when the task completes. Supports `$id` and url-encoded `$tag` placeholders substituted before the request is sent.
pingback_url.title_zh: 任务完成时以 GET 通知的回调 URL。支持 `$id` 与经 url 编码的 `$tag` 占位符，请求发送前会被替换。

version.title_zh: 处理本次响应的 DataForSEO API 当前版本号。

status_code.desc_en: Overall response status code for the request. Use it to detect success vs. error conditions; see the DataForSEO status-code reference for the full list.
status_code.title_zh: 整个请求的总体状态码。用于判断成功或错误；完整列表见 DataForSEO 状态码参考。

status_message.title_zh: 与总体 `status_code` 对应的可读说明信息。

time.desc_en: Total processing time of the request, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 请求的总处理耗时，单位秒。

cost.desc_en: Total cost of all tasks in this response, in USD.
cost.title_zh: 本次响应中所有任务的总费用，单位美元。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of tasks contained in the `tasks` array.
tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中包含的任务数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: Number of tasks in the `tasks` array that returned an error.
tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中返回错误的任务数量。

tasks.desc_en: Array of task objects, each carrying the status and results of one submitted task.
tasks.title_zh: 任务对象数组，每个元素承载一个已提交任务的状态与结果。

tasks.id.title_zh: 任务在 DataForSEO 系统中的唯一标识（UUID）。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Per-task status code (range 10000-60000) indicating how this individual task resolved.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 单个任务的状态码（取值 10000-60000），表示该任务的处理结果。

tasks.status_message.title_zh: 该任务 `status_code` 对应的可读说明信息。

tasks.time.title_zh: 单个任务的处理耗时，单位秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Cost of this individual task, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 单个任务的费用，单位美元。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's `result` array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: API URL path segments that identify the endpoint this task was routed to.
tasks.path.title_zh: 标识该任务所路由接口的 API URL 路径片段。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters supplied when the task was created (POST body or GET URL parameters).
tasks.data.title_zh: 创建任务时所提供参数的回显（POST 请求体或 GET URL 参数）。

tasks.result.desc_en: Array of result objects for the task. For a just-posted task this is null and is populated once the task completes.
tasks.result.title_zh: 任务的结果对象数组。对刚提交的任务此处为 null，任务完成后才会填充。

tasks.result.endpoint_html.desc_en: URL for collecting the HTML results of this completed task; may be null where HTML output is unavailable for the endpoint.
tasks.result.endpoint_html.title_zh: 用于收取该已完成任务 HTML 结果的 URL；若该接口不提供 HTML 输出则可能为 null。

id.desc_en: Task identifier (UUID) returned when posting a task; use it with the matching Task GET endpoint to collect the results within the task retention window.
id.title_zh: 提交任务时返回的任务标识（UUID）；在任务保留期内用它调用对应的 Task GET 接口收取结果。

id.desc_en: Task identifier (UUID) returned when posting a task; use it with the matching Task GET endpoint to collect the results within the task retention window.
id.title_zh: 提交任务时返回的任务标识（UUID）；在任务保留期内用它调用对应的 Task GET 接口收取结果。

asin.desc_en: Amazon Standard Identification Number (ASIN) of the product to look up. Obtain it from the Amazon Products endpoint; ASINs are assigned dynamically by Amazon (e.g. `B085RFFC9Q`).
asin.title_zh: 要查询商品的 Amazon 标准识别号（ASIN）。可通过 Amazon Products 接口获取；ASIN 由 Amazon 动态分配（如 `B085RFFC9Q`）。

priority.desc_en: Execution priority of the task: `1` normal (default), `2` high. High priority speeds up processing but incurs additional charges.
priority.title_zh: 任务执行优先级：`1` 普通（默认），`2` 高。高优先级加速处理但会额外计费。

location_name.desc_en: Full location name for the search engine (e.g. `London,England,United Kingdom`). Use this when not setting `location_code`/`location_coordinate`; fetch valid values from the corresponding locations endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 搜索引擎地区的完整名称（如 `London,England,United Kingdom`）。未设 `location_code`/`location_coordinate` 时使用；可调对应 locations 接口获取可用取值。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric location code for the search engine (e.g. `9045969`). Use this when not setting `location_name`/`location_coordinate`; fetch valid values from the corresponding locations endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 搜索引擎地区的数字代码（如 `9045969`）。未设 `location_name`/`location_coordinate` 时使用；可调对应 locations 接口获取可用取值。

location_coordinate.desc_en: GPS coordinates as `latitude,longitude,radius` (e.g. `53.476225,-2.243572,200`). Use instead of `location_name`/`location_code`; latitude/longitude allow up to 7 decimals and radius must be at least 199.9.
location_coordinate.title_zh: GPS 坐标，格式 `纬度,经度,半径`（如 `53.476225,-2.243572,200`）。可替代 `location_name`/`location_code`；经纬度最多 7 位小数，半径下限 199.9。

language_name.desc_en: Full language name for the search engine (e.g. `English (United Kingdom)`). Use when not setting `language_code`; fetch valid values from the corresponding languages endpoint.
language_name.title_zh: 搜索引擎语言的完整名称（如 `English (United Kingdom)`）。未设 `language_code` 时使用；可调对应 languages 接口获取可用取值。

language_code.desc_en: Language code for the search engine (e.g. `en_GB` for Amazon, `en` for app stores). Use when not setting `language_name`; fetch valid values from the corresponding languages endpoint.

tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中返回错误的任务数量。

tasks.title_zh: 任务对象数组，每个元素承载一个已提交任务的状态与结果。

tasks.id.title_zh: 任务在 DataForSEO 系统中的唯一标识（UUID）。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Per-task status code (range 10000-60000) indicating how this individual task resolved.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 单个任务的状态码（取值 10000-60000），表示该任务的处理结果。

tasks.status_message.title_zh: 该任务 `status_code` 对应的可读说明信息。

tasks.time.desc_en: Processing time of this individual task, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 单个任务的处理耗时，单位秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Cost of this individual task, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 单个任务的费用，单位美元。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's `result` array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: API URL path segments that identify the endpoint this task was routed to.
tasks.path.title_zh: 标识该任务所路由接口的 API URL 路径片段。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters supplied when the task was created (POST body or GET URL parameters).
tasks.data.title_zh: 创建任务时所提供参数的回显（POST 请求体或 GET URL 参数）。

tasks.result.desc_en: Array of result objects for the task. For a just-posted task this is null and is populated once the task completes.
tasks.result.title_zh: 任务的结果对象数组。对刚提交的任务此处为 null，任务完成后才会填充。

tasks.result.language_name.desc_en: Full name of the supported language.
tasks.result.language_name.title_zh: 受支持语言的完整名称。

tasks.result.language_code.desc_en: Language code applied to this result, per ISO 639-1.
tasks.result.language_code.title_zh: 本结果所应用的语言代码，遵循 ISO 639-1。

country.desc_en: Country ISO code echoed when filtering the locations list by country (e.g. `us`).
country.title_zh: 按国家过滤地区列表时回显的国家 ISO 代码（如 `us`）。

id.desc_en: Task identifier (UUID) returned when posting a task; use it with the matching Task GET endpoint to collect the results within the task retention window.
id.title_zh: 提交任务时返回的任务标识（UUID）；在任务保留期内用它调用对应的 Task GET 接口收取结果。

product_id.desc_en: Unique product identifier on Google Shopping (e.g. `4485466949985702538`); required if neither `data_docid` nor `gid` is given. Best paired with `data_docid` and `gid`; obtain it from the Google Shopping Products endpoint.
product_id.title_zh: Google Shopping 商品唯一标识（如 `4485466949985702538`）；未提供 `data_docid` 或 `gid` 时必填。建议与 `data_docid`、`gid` 搭配；可从 Google Shopping Products 接口获取。

data_docid.desc_en: Unique identifier of the Google Shopping SERP data element (e.g. `13071766526042404278`). Best paired with `product_id` and `gid`; obtain it from the Google Shopping Products endpoint.
data_docid.title_zh: Google Shopping SERP 数据元素的唯一标识（如 `13071766526042404278`）。建议与 `product_id`、`gid` 搭配；可从 Google Shopping Products 接口获取。

gid.desc_en: Global product identifier on Google Shopping (e.g. `4702526954592161872`); required if neither `product_id` nor `data_docid` is given. Best paired with `product_id` and `data_docid`; obtain it from the Google Shopping Products endpoint.
gid.title_zh: Google Shopping 全局商品标识（如 `4702526954592161872`）；未提供 `product_id` 或 `data_docid` 时必填。建议与 `product_id`、`data_docid` 搭配；可从 Google Shopping Products 接口获取。

priority.desc_en: Execution priority of the task: `1` normal (default), `2` high. High priority speeds up processing but incurs additional charges.
priority.title_zh: 任务执行优先级：`1` 普通（默认），`2` 高。高优先级加速处理但会额外计费。

location_name.desc_en: Full location name for the search engine (e.g. `London,England,United Kingdom`). Use this when not setting `location_code`/`location_coordinate`; fetch valid values from the corresponding locations endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 搜索引擎地区的完整名称（如 `London,England,United Kingdom`）。未设 `location_code`/`location_coordinate` 时使用；可调对应 locations 接口获取可用取值。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric location code for the search engine (e.g. `9045969`). Use this when not setting `location_name`/`location_coordinate`; fetch valid values from the corresponding locations endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 搜索引擎地区的数字代码（如 `9045969`）。未设 `location_name`/`location_coordinate` 时使用；可调对应 locations 接口获取可用取值。

location_coordinate.desc_en: GPS coordinates as `latitude,longitude,radius` (e.g. `53.476225,-2.243572,200`). Use instead of `location_name`/`location_code`; latitude/longitude allow up to 7 decimals and radius must be at least 199.9.
location_coordinate.title_zh: GPS 坐标，格式 `纬度,经度,半径`（如 `53.476225,-2.243572,200`）。可替代 `location_name`/`location_code`；经纬度最多 7 位小数，半径下限 199.9。

language_name.desc_en: Full language name for the search engine (e.g. `English (United Kingdom)`). Use when not setting `language_code`; fetch valid values from the corresponding languages endpoint.
language_name.title_zh: 搜索引擎语言的完整名称（如 `English (United Kingdom)`）。未设 `language_code` 时使用；可调对应 languages 接口获取可用取值。

language_code.desc_en: Language code for the search engine (e.g. `en_GB` for Amazon, `en` for app stores). Use when not setting `language_name`; fetch valid values from the corresponding languages endpoint.
language_code.title_zh: 搜索引擎语言代码（Amazon 如 `en_GB`，应用商店如 `en`）。未设 `language_name` 时使用；可调对应 languages 接口获取可用取值。

se_domain.desc_en: Custom search-engine domain (e.g. `amazon.co.uk`, `google.de`). Optional — by default the relevant domain is chosen automatically from the location and language.
se_domain.title_zh: 自定义搜索引擎域名（如 `amazon.co.uk`、`google.de`）。可选——默认会按地区与语言自动选择相应域名。

tag.desc_en: User-defined task label (up to 255 chars) echoed back in the response `data` object, so you can match results to the task you posted.
tag.title_zh: 用户自定义任务标签（上限 255 字符），会在响应 `data` 对象中回显，便于将结果与所提交任务对应。

postback_url.desc_en: Callback URL to which a gzip-compressed POST with the task results is sent once the task completes. Supports `$id` and url-encoded `$tag` placeholders that are substituted before sending.
postback_url.title_zh: 任务完成后接收结果的回调 URL，结果以 gzip 压缩经 POST 发送。支持 `$id` 与经 url 编码的 `$tag` 占位符，发送前会被替换。

postback_data.desc_en: Result datatype delivered to `postback_url`; required when `postback_url` is set. Selects which task-result format is pushed (e.g. `advanced`, `html`).
postback_data.title_zh: 推送到 `postback_url` 的结果数据类型；设置 `postback_url` 时必填。决定推送哪种任务结果格式（如 `advanced`、`html`）。

pingback_url.desc_en: Notification URL pinged via GET when the task completes. Supports `$id` and url-encoded `$tag` placeholders substituted before the request is sent.
pingback_url.title_zh: 任务完成时以 GET 通知的回调 URL。支持 `$id` 与经 url 编码的 `$tag` 占位符，请求发送前会被替换。

tasks.result.id.title_zh: 该结果所属已完成任务的标识（UUID）。

tasks.result.se.desc_en: Search engine specified when the task was created.
tasks.result.se.title_zh: 创建任务时指定的搜索引擎。

tasks.result.se_type.desc_en: Type of search engine used for this result (e.g. `organic`, `shopping`).
tasks.result.se_type.title_zh: 本结果所用的搜索引擎类型（如 `organic`、`shopping`）。

tasks.result.date_posted.desc_en: Timestamp (UTC) when the task was posted.

tasks.result.endpoint_advanced.desc_en: URL for collecting the advanced (structured JSON) results of this completed task.
tasks.result.endpoint_advanced.title_zh: 用于收取该已完成任务 advanced（结构化 JSON）结果的 URL。

tasks.result.endpoint_html.desc_en: URL for collecting the HTML results of this completed task; may be null where HTML output is unavailable for the endpoint.
tasks.result.endpoint_html.title_zh: 用于收取该已完成任务 HTML 结果的 URL；若该接口不提供 HTML 输出则可能为 null。

id.desc_en: Task identifier (UUID) returned when posting a task; use it with the matching Task GET endpoint to collect the results within the task retention window.
id.title_zh: 提交任务时返回的任务标识（UUID）；在任务保留期内用它调用对应的 Task GET 接口收取结果。

id.desc_en: Task identifier (UUID) returned when posting a task; use it with the matching Task GET endpoint to collect the results within the task retention window.
id.title_zh: 提交任务时返回的任务标识（UUID）；在任务保留期内用它调用对应的 Task GET 接口收取结果。

keyword.desc_en: Search query (product name or app keyword) to run. Up to 700 characters; `%##` sequences are URL-decoded and `+` becomes a space, so encode a literal `%` as `%25` and a literal `+` as `%2B`.
keyword.title_zh: 要检索的搜索词（商品名或应用关键词）。上限 700 字符；`%##` 会被解码、`+` 会被解码为空格，故字面 `%` 写作 `%25`、字面 `+` 写作 `%2B`。

url.desc_en: Direct search-query URL to parse instead of structured parameters. The URL must already encode the exact language and location; this method is the hardest to process and generally not recommended.
url.title_zh: 直接传入搜索查询的 URL，以替代结构化参数。URL 必须已编码确切的语言与地区；此方式处理最复杂，通常不推荐。

priority.desc_en: Execution priority of the task: `1` normal (default), `2` high. High priority speeds up processing but incurs additional charges.
priority.title_zh: 任务执行优先级：`1` 普通（默认），`2` 高。高优先级加速处理但会额外计费。

location_name.desc_en: Full location name for the search engine (e.g. `London,England,United Kingdom`). Use this when not setting `location_code`/`location_coordinate`; fetch valid values from the corresponding locations endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 搜索引擎地区的完整名称（如 `London,England,United Kingdom`）。未设 `location_code`/`location_coordinate` 时使用；可调对应 locations 接口获取可用取值。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric location code for the search engine (e.g. `9045969`). Use this when not setting `location_name`/`location_coordinate`; fetch valid values from the corresponding locations endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 搜索引擎地区的数字代码（如 `9045969`）。未设 `location_name`/`location_coordinate` 时使用；可调对应 locations 接口获取可用取值。

location_coordinate.desc_en: GPS coordinates as `latitude,longitude,radius` (e.g. `53.476225,-2.243572,200`). Use instead of `location_name`/`location_code`; latitude/longitude allow up to 7 decimals and radius must be at least 199.9.
location_coordinate.title_zh: GPS 坐标，格式 `纬度,经度,半径`（如 `53.476225,-2.243572,200`）。可替代 `location_name`/`location_code`；经纬度最多 7 位小数，半径下限 199.9。

language_name.desc_en: Full language name for the search engine (e.g. `English (United Kingdom)`). Use when not setting `language_code`; fetch valid values from the corresponding languages endpoint.
language_name.title_zh: 搜索引擎语言的完整名称（如 `English (United Kingdom)`）。未设 `language_code` 时使用；可调对应 languages 接口获取可用取值。

language_code.desc_en: Language code for the search engine (e.g. `en_GB` for Amazon, `en` for app stores). Use when not setting `language_name`; fetch valid values from the corresponding languages endpoint.
language_code.title_zh: 搜索引擎语言代码（Amazon 如 `en_GB`，应用商店如 `en`）。未设 `language_name` 时使用；可调对应 languages 接口获取可用取值。

se_domain.desc_en: Custom search-engine domain (e.g. `amazon.co.uk`, `google.de`). Optional — by default the relevant domain is chosen automatically from the location and language.
se_domain.title_zh: 自定义搜索引擎域名（如 `amazon.co.uk`、`google.de`）。可选——默认会按地区与语言自动选择相应域名。

depth.desc_en: Parsing depth — how many results/reviews/apps to return. Best set in multiples of the per-page batch size; raising it above one batch may add charges if extra results are returned. Limits vary by endpoint.
depth.title_zh: 解析深度——返回的结果/评论/应用数量。建议设为单页批量的整数倍；超过一个批量时若返回更多结果可能额外计费。上限因接口而异。

max_crawl_pages.desc_en: Maximum number of SERP pages to crawl (up to 7). Works together with `depth` to bound how much of the results page set is retrieved.
max_crawl_pages.title_zh: 最多爬取的 SERP 页数（上限 7）。与 `depth` 协同，共同限定抓取的结果页范围。

search_param.desc_en: Extra raw search-URL parameters for fine-grained control (e.g. price bounds, sort order). Ignored if `price_min`, `price_max`, or `sort_by` are also provided.
search_param.title_zh: 用于精细控制的原始搜索 URL 附加参数（如价格区间、排序）。若同时提供了 `price_min`、`price_max` 或 `sort_by`，则会被忽略。

price_min.desc_en: Minimum product price filter for the query (e.g. `5`). When set, `search_param` is ignored.
price_min.title_zh: 查询的商品最低价过滤（如 `5`）。一旦设置，`search_param` 将被忽略。

price_max.desc_en: Maximum product price filter for the query (e.g. `100`). When set, `search_param` is ignored.
price_max.title_zh: 查询的商品最高价过滤（如 `100`）。一旦设置，`search_param` 将被忽略。

sort_by.desc_en: Sorting rule: `review_score`, `price_low_to_high`, or `price_high_to_low`. When set, `search_param` is ignored.
sort_by.title_zh: 排序规则：`review_score`、`price_low_to_high` 或 `price_high_to_low`。设置后 `search_param` 被忽略。

tag.desc_en: User-defined task label (up to 255 chars) echoed back in the response `data` object, so you can match results to the task you posted.
tag.title_zh: 用户自定义任务标签（上限 255 字符），会在响应 `data` 对象中回显，便于将结果与所提交任务对应。

tasks.result.endpoint_advanced.desc_en: URL for collecting the advanced (structured JSON) results of this completed task.
tasks.result.endpoint_advanced.title_zh: 用于收取该已完成任务 advanced（结构化 JSON）结果的 URL。

tasks.result.endpoint_html.desc_en: URL for collecting the HTML results of this completed task; may be null where HTML output is unavailable for the endpoint.
tasks.result.endpoint_html.title_zh: 用于收取该已完成任务 HTML 结果的 URL；若该接口不提供 HTML 输出则可能为 null。

id.desc_en: Task identifier (UUID) returned when posting a task; use it with the matching Task GET endpoint to collect the results within the task retention window.
id.title_zh: 提交任务时返回的任务标识（UUID）；在任务保留期内用它调用对应的 Task GET 接口收取结果。

gid.desc_en: Global product identifier on Google Shopping (e.g. `4702526954592161872`). Best paired with `product_id` and `data_docid`; obtain it from the Google Shopping Products endpoint.
gid.title_zh: Google Shopping 全局商品标识（如 `4702526954592161872`）。建议与 `product_id`、`data_docid` 搭配；可从 Google Shopping Products 接口获取。

product_id.desc_en: Unique product identifier on Google Shopping (e.g. `4485466949985702538`). Best paired with `data_docid` and `gid`; obtain it from the Google Shopping Products endpoint.
product_id.title_zh: Google Shopping 商品的唯一标识（如 `4485466949985702538`）。建议与 `data_docid`、`gid` 搭配；可从 Google Shopping Products 接口获取。

data_docid.desc_en: Unique identifier of the Google Shopping SERP data element (e.g. `13071766526042404278`); required if neither `product_id` nor `gid` is given. Best paired with `product_id` and `gid`; obtain it from the Google Shopping Products endpoint.
data_docid.title_zh: Google Shopping SERP 数据元素的唯一标识（如 `13071766526042404278`）；未提供 `product_id` 或 `gid` 时必填。建议与 `product_id`、`gid` 搭配；可从 Google Shopping Products 接口获取。

priority.desc_en: Execution priority of the task: `1` normal (default), `2` high. High priority speeds up processing but incurs additional charges.
priority.title_zh: 任务执行优先级：`1` 普通（默认），`2` 高。高优先级加速处理但会额外计费。

location_name.desc_en: Full location name for the search engine (e.g. `London,England,United Kingdom`). Use this when not setting `location_code`/`location_coordinate`; fetch valid values from the corresponding locations endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 搜索引擎地区的完整名称（如 `London,England,United Kingdom`）。未设 `location_code`/`location_coordinate` 时使用；可调对应 locations 接口获取可用取值。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric location code for the search engine (e.g. `9045969`). Use this when not setting `location_name`/`location_coordinate`; fetch valid values from the corresponding locations endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 搜索引擎地区的数字代码（如 `9045969`）。未设 `location_name`/`location_coordinate` 时使用；可调对应 locations 接口获取可用取值。

location_coordinate.desc_en: GPS coordinates as `latitude,longitude,radius` (e.g. `53.476225,-2.243572,200`). Use instead of `location_name`/`location_code`; latitude/longitude allow up to 7 decimals and radius must be at least 199.9.
location_coordinate.title_zh: GPS 坐标，格式 `纬度,经度,半径`（如 `53.476225,-2.243572,200`）。可替代 `location_name`/`location_code`；经纬度最多 7 位小数，半径下限 199.9。

language_name.desc_en: Full language name for the search engine (e.g. `English (United Kingdom)`). Use when not setting `language_code`; fetch valid values from the corresponding languages endpoint.
language_name.title_zh: 搜索引擎语言的完整名称（如 `English (United Kingdom)`）。未设 `language_code` 时使用；可调对应 languages 接口获取可用取值。

language_code.desc_en: Language code for the search engine (e.g. `en_GB` for Amazon, `en` for app stores). Use when not setting `language_name`; fetch valid values from the corresponding languages endpoint.
language_code.title_zh: 搜索引擎语言代码（Amazon 如 `en_GB`，应用商店如 `en`）。未设 `language_name` 时使用；可调对应 languages 接口获取可用取值。

se_domain.desc_en: Custom search-engine domain (e.g. `amazon.co.uk`, `google.de`). Optional — by default the relevant domain is chosen automatically from the location and language.
se_domain.title_zh: 自定义搜索引擎域名（如 `amazon.co.uk`、`google.de`）。可选——默认会按地区与语言自动选择相应域名。

depth.desc_en: Parsing depth — how many results/reviews/apps to return. Best set in multiples of the per-page batch size; raising it above one batch may add charges if extra results are returned. Limits vary by endpoint.
depth.title_zh: 解析深度——返回的结果/评论/应用数量。建议设为单页批量的整数倍；超过一个批量时若返回更多结果可能额外计费。上限因接口而异。

tag.desc_en: User-defined task label (up to 255 chars) echoed back in the response `data` object, so you can match results to the task you posted.
tag.title_zh: 用户自定义任务标签（上限 255 字符），会在响应 `data` 对象中回显，便于将结果与所提交任务对应。

postback_url.desc_en: Callback URL to which a gzip-compressed POST with the task results is sent once the task completes. Supports `$id` and url-encoded `$tag` placeholders that are substituted before sending.
postback_url.title_zh: 任务完成后接收结果的回调 URL，结果以 gzip 压缩经 POST 发送。支持 `$id` 与经 url 编码的 `$tag` 占位符，发送前会被替换。

postback_data.desc_en: Result datatype delivered to `postback_url`; required when `postback_url` is set. Selects which task-result format is pushed (e.g. `advanced`, `html`).
postback_data.title_zh: 推送到 `postback_url` 的结果数据类型；设置 `postback_url` 时必填。决定推送哪种任务结果格式（如 `advanced`、`html`）。

pingback_url.desc_en: Notification URL pinged via GET when the task completes. Supports `$id` and url-encoded `$tag` placeholders substituted before the request is sent.
pingback_url.title_zh: 任务完成时以 GET 通知的回调 URL。支持 `$id` 与经 url 编码的 `$tag` 占位符，请求发送前会被替换。

postback_url.desc_en: Callback URL to which a gzip-compressed POST with the task results is sent once the task completes. Supports `$id` and url-encoded `$tag` placeholders that are substituted before sending.

pingback_url.title_zh: 任务完成时以 GET 通知的回调 URL。支持 `$id` 与经 url 编码的 `$tag` 占位符，请求发送前会被替换。

version.desc_en: Current version of the DataForSEO API that served the response.
version.title_zh: 处理本次响应的 DataForSEO API 当前版本号。

status_code.desc_en: Overall response status code for the request. Use it to detect success vs. error conditions; see the DataForSEO status-code reference for the full list.
status_code.title_zh: 整个请求的总体状态码。用于判断成功或错误；完整列表见 DataForSEO 状态码参考。

status_message.title_zh: 与总体 `status_code` 对应的可读说明信息。

time.desc_en: Total processing time of the request, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 请求的总处理耗时，单位秒。

cost.desc_en: Total cost of all tasks in this response, in USD.
cost.title_zh: 本次响应中所有任务的总费用，单位美元。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of tasks contained in the `tasks` array.
tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中包含的任务数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: Number of tasks in the `tasks` array that returned an error.
tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中返回错误的任务数量。

tasks.desc_en: Array of task objects, each carrying the status and results of one submitted task.
tasks.title_zh: 任务对象数组，每个元素承载一个已提交任务的状态与结果。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique identifier (UUID) of the task within the DataForSEO system.
tasks.id.title_zh: 任务在 DataForSEO 系统中的唯一标识（UUID）。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Per-task status code (range 10000-60000) indicating how this individual task resolved.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 单个任务的状态码（取值 10000-60000），表示该任务的处理结果。

tasks.status_message.title_zh: 该任务 `status_code` 对应的可读说明信息。

tasks.time.desc_en: Processing time of this individual task, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 单个任务的处理耗时，单位秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Cost of this individual task, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 单个任务的费用，单位美元。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's `result` array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: API URL path segments that identify the endpoint this task was routed to.
tasks.path.title_zh: 标识该任务所路由接口的 API URL 路径片段。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters supplied when the task was created (POST body or GET URL parameters).
tasks.data.title_zh: 创建任务时所提供参数的回显（POST 请求体或 GET URL 参数）。

tasks.result.desc_en: Array of result objects for the task. For a just-posted task this is null and is populated once the task completes.
tasks.result.title_zh: 任务的结果对象数组。对刚提交的任务此处为 null，任务完成后才会填充。

tasks.result.category.desc_en: Name of a supported app category.
tasks.result.category.title_zh: 某个受支持应用分类的名称。

tasks.result.count.desc_en: Number of items returned in this result's `items` array.
tasks.result.count.title_zh: 本结果 `items` 数组中返回的条目数量。

categories.desc_en: App-listing categories used to scope the search; up to 10 may be specified. Fetch valid values from the app-listings categories endpoint.
categories.title_zh: 用于限定搜索范围的应用分类，最多 10 个。可调 app-listings categories 接口获取可用取值。

description.desc_en: Keyword that must appear in the app description (up to 200 chars).
description.title_zh: 必须出现在应用描述中的关键词（上限 200 字符）。

title.desc_en: Keyword that must appear in the app title (up to 200 chars).
title.title_zh: 必须出现在应用标题中的关键词（上限 200 字符）。

filters.desc_en: Array of result-filtering conditions (up to 8), joined by `and`/`or`. Each condition is `[field, operator, value]` (e.g. `["rating.value",">",3]`); operators include comparison, `in`/`not_in`, `like`/`not_like`, `regex`. Fetch supported fields from the available-filters endpoint.
filters.title_zh: 结果过滤条件数组（最多 8 个），用 `and`/`or` 连接。每个条件为 `[字段, 操作符, 值]`（如 `["rating.value",">",3]`）；操作符含比较、`in`/`not_in`、`like`/`not_like`、`regex`。可调 available-filters 接口获取支持的字段。

order_by.desc_en: Result sorting rules using the same fields as `filters`, formatted as `field,asc|desc` (e.g. `["item.rating.value,desc"]`). Up to three rules per request.
order_by.title_zh: 结果排序规则，使用与 `filters` 相同的字段，格式 `字段,asc|desc`（如 `["item.rating.value,desc"]`）。单次请求最多三条。

limit.desc_en: Maximum number of apps to return.

offset.desc_en: Number of leading results to skip in the returned array (e.g. `10` omits the first ten). Recommended only up to ~10,000 results; beyond that use `offset_token`.
offset.title_zh: 返回数组中跳过的前导结果数（如 `10` 略过前十条）。建议仅在约 1 万条以内使用；超出请改用 `offset_token`。

offset_token.desc_en: Pagination token returned in the response of the previous request; pass it back to fetch subsequent results and avoid timeouts on very large result sets. When used, all other parameters must match the previous request, and each token is single-use.
offset_token.title_zh: 上一次请求响应中返回的分页令牌；回传以获取后续结果并避免超大结果集超时。使用时其余参数须与上次请求一致，且每个令牌仅一次性有效。

tag.desc_en: User-defined task label (up to 255 chars) echoed back in the response `data` object, so you can match results to the task you posted.
tag.title_zh: 用户自定义任务标签（上限 255 字符），会在响应 `data` 对象中回显，便于将结果与所提交任务对应。

version.desc_en: Current version of the DataForSEO API that served the response.
version.title_zh: 处理本次响应的 DataForSEO API 当前版本号。

status_code.desc_en: Overall response status code for the request. Use it to detect success vs. error conditions; see the DataForSEO status-code reference for the full list.
status_code.title_zh: 整个请求的总体状态码。用于判断成功或错误；完整列表见 DataForSEO 状态码参考。

status_message.title_zh: 与总体 `status_code` 对应的可读说明信息。

time.title_zh: 请求的总处理耗时，单位秒。

tasks.status_code.title_zh: 单个任务的状态码（取值 10000-60000），表示该任务的处理结果。

tasks.status_message.title_zh: 该任务 `status_code` 对应的可读说明信息。

tasks.time.title_zh: 单个任务的处理耗时，单位秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Cost of this individual task, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 单个任务的费用，单位美元。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's `result` array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: API URL path segments that identify the endpoint this task was routed to.
tasks.path.title_zh: 标识该任务所路由接口的 API URL 路径片段。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters supplied when the task was created (POST body or GET URL parameters).
tasks.data.title_zh: 创建任务时所提供参数的回显（POST 请求体或 GET URL 参数）。

tasks.result.desc_en: Array of result objects for the task. For a just-posted task this is null and is populated once the task completes.
tasks.result.title_zh: 任务的结果对象数组。对刚提交的任务此处为 null，任务完成后才会填充。

tasks.result.total_count.desc_en: Total number of relevant results available in the database for this query.
tasks.result.total_count.title_zh: 数据库中该查询的相关结果总数。

tasks.result.count.desc_en: Number of items returned in this result's `items` array.
tasks.result.count.title_zh: 本结果 `items` 数组中返回的条目数量。

tasks.result.offset.desc_en: Offset applied within the returned apps array.
tasks.result.offset.title_zh: 返回应用数组中所应用的偏移量。

tasks.result.offset_token.desc_en: Pagination token to pass into a subsequent POST request to retrieve large result sets (over 100,000) without timeouts.
tasks.result.offset_token.title_zh: 分页令牌，可在后续 POST 请求中回传，以避免超大结果集（超过 10 万条）超时。

tasks.result.items.desc_en: Array of apps (or products) and their related data returned for the query.
tasks.result.items.title_zh: 查询返回的应用（或商品）及其相关数据的数组。

tasks.result.items.se_domain.desc_en: Search-engine domain echoed from the POST request for this item.
tasks.result.items.se_domain.title_zh: 该条目从 POST 请求回显的搜索引擎域名。

tasks.result.items.location_code.desc_en: Location code echoed from the POST request for this item.
tasks.result.items.location_code.title_zh: 该条目从 POST 请求回显的地区代码。

tasks.result.items.language_code.desc_en: Language code echoed from the POST request for this item.
tasks.result.items.language_code.title_zh: 该条目从 POST 请求回显的语言代码。

tasks.result.items.check_url.desc_en: Direct URL to the search-engine results, usable to verify the returned data.
tasks.result.items.check_url.title_zh: 搜索引擎结果的直达 URL，可用于核对返回数据。

tasks.result.items.time_update.desc_en: Timestamp (UTC) when the SERP data was last updated.
tasks.result.items.time_update.title_zh: SERP 数据最后更新的时间戳（UTC）。

tasks.result.items.item.desc_en: Detailed information object for the app in this item.
tasks.result.items.item.title_zh: 本条目中应用的详细信息对象。

tasks.result.items.item.rank_group.desc_en: Rank within the group of items sharing the same `type`; items of differing types are skipped in this count.
tasks.result.items.item.rank_group.title_zh: 在相同 `type` 的条目组内的排名；不同 `type` 的条目不计入。

tasks.result.items.item.rank_absolute.desc_en: Absolute rank of the app across the entire returned list, regardless of type.
tasks.result.items.item.rank_absolute.title_zh: 应用在整个返回列表中的绝对排名，不区分类型。

tasks.result.items.item.position.desc_en: Alignment of the element within the SERP (e.g. `left`).
tasks.result.items.item.position.title_zh: 元素在 SERP 中的对齐位置（如 `left`）。

tasks.result.items.item.url.desc_en: URL to the app's page on the store.
tasks.result.items.item.url.title_zh: 应用在商店中的页面 URL。

tasks.result.items.item.icon.desc_en: URL to the app's icon image.

tasks.result.items.item.description.desc_en: Description text of the returned app.

tasks.result.items.item.reviews_count.desc_en: Total number of reviews the app has.

tasks.result.items.item.rating.desc_en: Average rating object of the app.

tasks.result.items.item.rating.votes_cou.desc_en: Number of ratings/feedback contributing to the value; may be null.
tasks.result.items.item.rating.votes_cou.title_zh: 构成该评分的投票/反馈数量；可能为 null。

tasks.result.items.item.rating.rating_ma.desc_en: Maximum possible value for the rating scale (e.g. 5 for `Max5`).
tasks.result.items.item.rating.rating_ma.title_zh: 该评分量表的最大可能值（如 `Max5` 为 5）。

tasks.result.items.item.price.current.desc_en: Current price shown for the app.

tasks.result.items.item.price.regular.title_zh: 应用的常规（未打折）价格。

tasks.result.items.item.price.max_value.desc_en: Maximum price when the app is offered as a price range.
tasks.result.items.item.price.max_value.title_zh: 当应用以价格区间提供时的最高价。

tasks.result.items.item.price.currency.desc_en: ISO currency code of the listed price.
tasks.result.items.item.price.currency.title_zh: 所列价格的 ISO 货币代码。

tasks.result.items.item.price.is_price_r.desc_en: Indicates whether the price is given as a range rather than a single value.
tasks.result.items.item.price.is_price_r.title_zh: 表示价格是否以区间而非单一数值给出。

tasks.result.items.item.price.displayed_.desc_en: Raw price string exactly as shown in the result.
tasks.result.items.item.price.displayed_.title_zh: 结果中原样显示的价格字符串。

tasks.result.items.item.is_free.desc_en: Indicates whether the app is free.

tasks.result.items.item.main_category.desc_en: Primary store category most relevant to the app.
tasks.result.items.item.main_category.title_zh: 与应用最相关的主要商店分类。

tasks.result.items.item.categories.desc_en: Additional store categories relevant to the app.
tasks.result.items.item.categories.title_zh: 与应用相关的其他商店分类。

tasks.result.items.item.advisories.desc_en: App advisory ratings and usage restrictions (e.g. content warnings).
tasks.result.items.item.advisories.title_zh: 应用的内容分级与使用限制提示（如内容警示）。

tasks.result.items.item.developer_id.desc_en: Identifier of the developer on the store.
tasks.result.items.item.developer_id.title_zh: 开发者在商店中的标识。

tasks.result.items.item.developer_url.desc_en: URL to the developer's page on the store.
tasks.result.items.item.developer_url.title_zh: 开发者在商店中的页面 URL。

tasks.result.items.item.minimum_os_versi.desc_en: Minimum OS version required to install the app.
tasks.result.items.item.minimum_os_versi.title_zh: 安装应用所需的最低操作系统版本。

tasks.result.items.item.released_date.desc_en: Date and time the app was first released, in UTC (`yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00`).
tasks.result.items.item.released_date.title_zh: 应用首次发布的日期时间，UTC 格式（`yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00`）。

tasks.result.items.item.last_update_date.desc_en: Date and time the app was last updated, in UTC (`yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00`).
tasks.result.items.item.last_update_date.title_zh: 应用最后更新的日期时间，UTC 格式（`yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00`）。

tasks.result.items.item.update_notes.desc_en: Latest update notes provided by the developer.
tasks.result.items.item.update_notes.title_zh: 开发者提供的最新更新说明。

tasks.result.items.item.images.desc_en: URLs to the screenshots/images shown on the app's store page.
tasks.result.items.item.images.title_zh: 应用商店页面所展示截图/图片的 URL。

tasks.result.items.item.similar_apps.desc_en: List of apps similar to this app.
tasks.result.items.item.similar_apps.title_zh: 与本应用相似的应用列表。

tasks.result.items.item.similar_apps.url.desc_en: URL to the similar app's store page.
tasks.result.items.item.similar_apps.url.title_zh: 相似应用商店页面的 URL。

tasks.result.items.item.more_apps_by_dev.desc_en: Other apps built by the same developer.
tasks.result.items.item.more_apps_by_dev.title_zh: 同一开发者发布的其他应用。

tasks.result.items.item.more_apps_by_dev.desc_en: Identifier of the developer's other app.
tasks.result.items.item.more_apps_by_dev.title_zh: 该开发者其他应用的标识。

tasks.result.items.item.more_apps_by_dev.desc_en: Title of the developer's other app.
tasks.result.items.item.more_apps_by_dev.title_zh: 该开发者其他应用的标题。

tasks.result.items.item.more_apps_by_dev.desc_en: URL to the developer's other app store page.
tasks.result.items.item.more_apps_by_dev.title_zh: 该开发者其他应用商店页面的 URL。

id.desc_en: Task identifier (UUID) returned when posting a task; use it with the matching Task GET endpoint to collect the results within the task retention window.
id.title_zh: 提交任务时返回的任务标识（UUID）；在任务保留期内用它调用对应的 Task GET 接口收取结果。

app_id.desc_en: Identifier of the target app on the store. For Google Play it is the package id from the app URL (e.g. `org.telegram.messenger`); for App Store it is the numeric id from the app URL (e.g. `835599320`).
app_id.title_zh: 目标应用在商店中的标识。Google Play 为应用 URL 中的包名（如 `org.telegram.messenger`）；App Store 为应用 URL 中的数字 id（如 `835599320`）。

location_name.desc_en: Full location name for the search engine (e.g. `London,England,United Kingdom`). Use this when not setting `location_code`/`location_coordinate`; fetch valid values from the corresponding locations endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 搜索引擎地区的完整名称（如 `London,England,United Kingdom`）。未设 `location_code`/`location_coordinate` 时使用；可调对应 locations 接口获取可用取值。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric location code for the search engine (e.g. `9045969`). Use this when not setting `location_name`/`location_coordinate`; fetch valid values from the corresponding locations endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 搜索引擎地区的数字代码（如 `9045969`）。未设 `location_name`/`location_coordinate` 时使用；可调对应 locations 接口获取可用取值。

language_name.desc_en: Full language name for the search engine (e.g. `English (United Kingdom)`). Use when not setting `language_code`; fetch valid values from the corresponding languages endpoint.
language_name.title_zh: 搜索引擎语言的完整名称（如 `English (United Kingdom)`）。未设 `language_code` 时使用；可调对应 languages 接口获取可用取值。

language_code.desc_en: Language code for the search engine (e.g. `en_GB` for Amazon, `en` for app stores). Use when not setting `language_name`; fetch valid values from the corresponding languages endpoint.
language_code.title_zh: 搜索引擎语言代码（Amazon 如 `en_GB`，应用商店如 `en`）。未设 `language_name` 时使用；可调对应 languages 接口获取可用取值。

priority.desc_en: Execution priority of the task: `1` normal (default), `2` high. High priority speeds up processing but incurs additional charges.
priority.title_zh: 任务执行优先级：`1` 普通（默认），`2` 高。高优先级加速处理但会额外计费。

depth.desc_en: Parsing depth — how many results/reviews/apps to return. Best set in multiples of the per-page batch size; raising it above one batch may add charges if extra results are returned. Limits vary by endpoint.
depth.title_zh: 解析深度——返回的结果/评论/应用数量。建议设为单页批量的整数倍；超过一个批量时若返回更多结果可能额外计费。上限因接口而异。

sort_by.desc_en: Sorting of returned reviews: `most_recent` (most recent) or `most_helpful`. Default is `most_helpful`.
sort_by.title_zh: 返回评论的排序：`most_recent`（最新）或 `most_helpful`。默认 `most_helpful`。

tag.desc_en: User-defined task label (up to 255 chars) echoed back in the response `data` object, so you can match results to the task you posted.
tag.title_zh: 用户自定义任务标签（上限 255 字符），会在响应 `data` 对象中回显，便于将结果与所提交任务对应。

postback_url.desc_en: Callback URL to which a gzip-compressed POST with the task results is sent once the task completes. Supports `$id` and url-encoded `$tag` placeholders that are substituted before sending.
postback_url.title_zh: 任务完成后接收结果的回调 URL，结果以 gzip 压缩经 POST 发送。支持 `$id` 与经 url 编码的 `$tag` 占位符，发送前会被替换。

postback_data.desc_en: Result datatype delivered to `postback_url`; required when `postback_url` is set. Selects which task-result format is pushed (e.g. `advanced`, `html`).
postback_data.title_zh: 推送到 `postback_url` 的结果数据类型；设置 `postback_url` 时必填。决定推送哪种任务结果格式（如 `advanced`、`html`）。

pingback_url.desc_en: Notification URL pinged via GET when the task completes. Supports `$id` and url-encoded `$tag` placeholders substituted before the request is sent.
pingback_url.title_zh: 任务完成时以 GET 通知的回调 URL。支持 `$id` 与经 url 编码的 `$tag` 占位符，请求发送前会被替换。

version.desc_en: Current version of the DataForSEO API that served the response.
version.title_zh: 处理本次响应的 DataForSEO API 当前版本号。

status_code.desc_en: Overall response status code for the request. Use it to detect success vs. error conditions; see the DataForSEO status-code reference for the full list.
status_code.title_zh: 整个请求的总体状态码。用于判断成功或错误；完整列表见 DataForSEO 状态码参考。

status_message.title_zh: 与总体 `status_code` 对应的可读说明信息。

time.desc_en: Total processing time of the request, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 请求的总处理耗时，单位秒。

cost.desc_en: Total cost of all tasks in this response, in USD.
cost.title_zh: 本次响应中所有任务的总费用，单位美元。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of tasks contained in the `tasks` array.
tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中包含的任务数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: Number of tasks in the `tasks` array that returned an error.
tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中返回错误的任务数量。

tasks.desc_en: Array of task objects, each carrying the status and results of one submitted task.
tasks.title_zh: 任务对象数组，每个元素承载一个已提交任务的状态与结果。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique identifier (UUID) of the task within the DataForSEO system.
tasks.id.title_zh: 任务在 DataForSEO 系统中的唯一标识（UUID）。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Per-task status code (range 10000-60000) indicating how this individual task resolved.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 单个任务的状态码（取值 10000-60000），表示该任务的处理结果。

tasks.status_message.title_zh: 该任务 `status_code` 对应的可读说明信息。

tasks.time.desc_en: Processing time of this individual task, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 单个任务的处理耗时，单位秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Cost of this individual task, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 单个任务的费用，单位美元。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's `result` array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: API URL path segments that identify the endpoint this task was routed to.
tasks.path.title_zh: 标识该任务所路由接口的 API URL 路径片段。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters supplied when the task was created (POST body or GET URL parameters).
tasks.data.title_zh: 创建任务时所提供参数的回显（POST 请求体或 GET URL 参数）。

tasks.result.desc_en: Array of result objects for the task. For a just-posted task this is null and is populated once the task completes.
tasks.result.title_zh: 任务的结果对象数组。对刚提交的任务此处为 null，任务完成后才会填充。

id.desc_en: Task identifier (UUID) returned when posting a task; use it with the matching Task GET endpoint to collect the results within the task retention window.
id.title_zh: 提交任务时返回的任务标识（UUID）；在任务保留期内用它调用对应的 Task GET 接口收取结果。

keyword.desc_en: Search query (product name or app keyword) to run. Up to 700 characters; `%##` sequences are URL-decoded and `+` becomes a space, so encode a literal `%` as `%25` and a literal `+` as `%2B`.
keyword.title_zh: 要检索的搜索词（商品名或应用关键词）。上限 700 字符；`%##` 会被解码、`+` 会被解码为空格，故字面 `%` 写作 `%25`、字面 `+` 写作 `%2B`。

location_name.desc_en: Full location name for the search engine (e.g. `London,England,United Kingdom`). Use this when not setting `location_code`/`location_coordinate`; fetch valid values from the corresponding locations endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 搜索引擎地区的完整名称（如 `London,England,United Kingdom`）。未设 `location_code`/`location_coordinate` 时使用；可调对应 locations 接口获取可用取值。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric location code for the search engine (e.g. `9045969`). Use this when not setting `location_name`/`location_coordinate`; fetch valid values from the corresponding locations endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 搜索引擎地区的数字代码（如 `9045969`）。未设 `location_name`/`location_coordinate` 时使用；可调对应 locations 接口获取可用取值。

language_name.desc_en: Full language name for the search engine (e.g. `English (United Kingdom)`). Use when not setting `language_code`; fetch valid values from the corresponding languages endpoint.
language_name.title_zh: 搜索引擎语言的完整名称（如 `English (United Kingdom)`）。未设 `language_code` 时使用；可调对应 languages 接口获取可用取值。

language_code.desc_en: Language code for the search engine (e.g. `en_GB` for Amazon, `en` for app stores). Use when not setting `language_name`; fetch valid values from the corresponding languages endpoint.
language_code.title_zh: 搜索引擎语言代码（Amazon 如 `en_GB`，应用商店如 `en`）。未设 `language_name` 时使用；可调对应 languages 接口获取可用取值。

priority.desc_en: Execution priority of the task: `1` normal (default), `2` high. High priority speeds up processing but incurs additional charges.
priority.title_zh: 任务执行优先级：`1` 普通（默认），`2` 高。高优先级加速处理但会额外计费。

depth.desc_en: Parsing depth — how many results/reviews/apps to return. Best set in multiples of the per-page batch size; raising it above one batch may add charges if extra results are returned. Limits vary by endpoint.
depth.title_zh: 解析深度——返回的结果/评论/应用数量。建议设为单页批量的整数倍；超过一个批量时若返回更多结果可能额外计费。上限因接口而异。

tag.desc_en: User-defined task label (up to 255 chars) echoed back in the response `data` object, so you can match results to the task you posted.
tag.title_zh: 用户自定义任务标签（上限 255 字符），会在响应 `data` 对象中回显，便于将结果与所提交任务对应。

postback_url.desc_en: Callback URL to which a gzip-compressed POST with the task results is sent once the task completes. Supports `$id` and url-encoded `$tag` placeholders that are substituted before sending.
postback_url.title_zh: 任务完成后接收结果的回调 URL，结果以 gzip 压缩经 POST 发送。支持 `$id` 与经 url 编码的 `$tag` 占位符，发送前会被替换。

postback_data.desc_en: Result datatype delivered to `postback_url`; required when `postback_url` is set. Selects which task-result format is pushed (e.g. `advanced`, `html`).
postback_data.title_zh: 推送到 `postback_url` 的结果数据类型；设置 `postback_url` 时必填。决定推送哪种任务结果格式（如 `advanced`、`html`）。

pingback_url.desc_en: Notification URL pinged via GET when the task completes. Supports `$id` and url-encoded `$tag` placeholders substituted before the request is sent.
pingback_url.title_zh: 任务完成时以 GET 通知的回调 URL。支持 `$id` 与经 url 编码的 `$tag` 占位符，请求发送前会被替换。

version.desc_en: Current version of the DataForSEO API that served the response.
version.title_zh: 处理本次响应的 DataForSEO API 当前版本号。

status_code.desc_en: Overall response status code for the request. Use it to detect success vs. error conditions; see the DataForSEO status-code reference for the full list.
status_code.title_zh: 整个请求的总体状态码。用于判断成功或错误；完整列表见 DataForSEO 状态码参考。

status_message.title_zh: 与总体 `status_code` 对应的可读说明信息。

time.desc_en: Total processing time of the request, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 请求的总处理耗时，单位秒。

cost.desc_en: Total cost of all tasks in this response, in USD.
cost.title_zh: 本次响应中所有任务的总费用，单位美元。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of tasks contained in the `tasks` array.
tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中包含的任务数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: Number of tasks in the `tasks` array that returned an error.
tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中返回错误的任务数量。

tasks.title_zh: 任务对象数组，每个元素承载一个已提交任务的状态与结果。

tasks.id.title_zh: 任务在 DataForSEO 系统中的唯一标识（UUID）。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Per-task status code (range 10000-60000) indicating how this individual task resolved.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 单个任务的状态码（取值 10000-60000），表示该任务的处理结果。

tasks.status_message.title_zh: 该任务 `status_code` 对应的可读说明信息。

tasks.time.desc_en: Processing time of this individual task, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 单个任务的处理耗时，单位秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Cost of this individual task, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 单个任务的费用，单位美元。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's `result` array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: API URL path segments that identify the endpoint this task was routed to.
tasks.path.title_zh: 标识该任务所路由接口的 API URL 路径片段。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters supplied when the task was created (POST body or GET URL parameters).
tasks.data.title_zh: 创建任务时所提供参数的回显（POST 请求体或 GET URL 参数）。

tasks.result.desc_en: Array of result objects for the task. For a just-posted task this is null and is populated once the task completes.
tasks.result.title_zh: 任务的结果对象数组。对刚提交的任务此处为 null，任务完成后才会填充。

id.desc_en: Task identifier (UUID) returned when posting a task; use it with the matching Task GET endpoint to collect the results within the task retention window.
id.title_zh: 提交任务时返回的任务标识（UUID）；在任务保留期内用它调用对应的 Task GET 接口收取结果。

id.desc_en: Task identifier (UUID) returned when posting a task; use it with the matching Task GET endpoint to collect the results within the task retention window.
id.title_zh: 提交任务时返回的任务标识（UUID）；在任务保留期内用它调用对应的 Task GET 接口收取结果。

app_collection.desc_en: Top-chart collection to pull apps from (e.g. Google Play `featured`/`topselling_paid`/`topgrossing`, App Store `top_free_ios`/`top_paid_ios`/`new_ios`). On Google Play, `featured` cannot be combined with `app_category`.
app_collection.title_zh: 拉取应用所用的榜单集合（如 Google Play `featured`/`topselling_paid`/`topgrossing`，App Store `top_free_ios`/`top_paid_ios`/`new_ios`）。Google Play 上 `featured` 不能与 `app_category` 同时使用。

location_name.desc_en: Full location name for the search engine (e.g. `London,England,United Kingdom`). Use this when not setting `location_code`/`location_coordinate`; fetch valid values from the corresponding locations endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 搜索引擎地区的完整名称（如 `London,England,United Kingdom`）。未设 `location_code`/`location_coordinate` 时使用；可调对应 locations 接口获取可用取值。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric location code for the search engine (e.g. `9045969`). Use this when not setting `location_name`/`location_coordinate`; fetch valid values from the corresponding locations endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 搜索引擎地区的数字代码（如 `9045969`）。未设 `location_name`/`location_coordinate` 时使用；可调对应 locations 接口获取可用取值。

language_name.desc_en: Full language name for the search engine (e.g. `English (United Kingdom)`). Use when not setting `language_code`; fetch valid values from the corresponding languages endpoint.
language_name.title_zh: 搜索引擎语言的完整名称（如 `English (United Kingdom)`）。未设 `language_code` 时使用；可调对应 languages 接口获取可用取值。

language_code.desc_en: Language code for the search engine (e.g. `en_GB` for Amazon, `en` for app stores). Use when not setting `language_name`; fetch valid values from the corresponding languages endpoint.
language_code.title_zh: 搜索引擎语言代码（Amazon 如 `en_GB`，应用商店如 `en`）。未设 `language_name` 时使用；可调对应 languages 接口获取可用取值。

priority.desc_en: Execution priority of the task: `1` normal (default), `2` high. High priority speeds up processing but incurs additional charges.
priority.title_zh: 任务执行优先级：`1` 普通（默认），`2` 高。高优先级加速处理但会额外计费。

depth.desc_en: Parsing depth — how many results/reviews/apps to return. Best set in multiples of the per-page batch size; raising it above one batch may add charges if extra results are returned. Limits vary by endpoint.
depth.title_zh: 解析深度——返回的结果/评论/应用数量。建议设为单页批量的整数倍；超过一个批量时若返回更多结果可能额外计费。上限因接口而异。

app_category.desc_en: App-store category to filter results by (e.g. `lifestyle`, `family`). Fetch valid values from the categories endpoint. On Google Play it cannot be combined with `app_collection: featured`.
app_category.title_zh: 用于过滤结果的应用商店分类（如 `lifestyle`、`family`）。可调 categories 接口获取可用取值。Google Play 上不能与 `app_collection: featured` 同时使用。

age_rating.desc_en: Filter results by age rating: `ages_up_to_5`, `ages_6_8`, `ages_9_12`. By default all ages are returned. Only effective together with `category: family`.
age_rating.title_zh: 按年龄分级过滤结果：`ages_up_to_5`、`ages_6_8`、`ages_9_12`。默认返回全部年龄段。仅在与 `category: family` 同用时生效。

tag.desc_en: User-defined task label (up to 255 chars) echoed back in the response `data` object, so you can match results to the task you posted.
tag.title_zh: 用户自定义任务标签（上限 255 字符），会在响应 `data` 对象中回显，便于将结果与所提交任务对应。

postback_url.desc_en: Callback URL to which a gzip-compressed POST with the task results is sent once the task completes. Supports `$id` and url-encoded `$tag` placeholders that are substituted before sending.
postback_url.title_zh: 任务完成后接收结果的回调 URL，结果以 gzip 压缩经 POST 发送。支持 `$id` 与经 url 编码的 `$tag` 占位符，发送前会被替换。

postback_data.desc_en: Result datatype delivered to `postback_url`; required when `postback_url` is set. Selects which task-result format is pushed (e.g. `advanced`, `html`).
postback_data.title_zh: 推送到 `postback_url` 的结果数据类型；设置 `postback_url` 时必填。决定推送哪种任务结果格式（如 `advanced`、`html`）。

pingback_url.desc_en: Notification URL pinged via GET when the task completes. Supports `$id` and url-encoded `$tag` placeholders substituted before the request is sent.
pingback_url.title_zh: 任务完成时以 GET 通知的回调 URL。支持 `$id` 与经 url 编码的 `$tag` 占位符，请求发送前会被替换。

version.desc_en: Current version of the DataForSEO API that served the response.
version.title_zh: 处理本次响应的 DataForSEO API 当前版本号。

status_code.desc_en: Overall response status code for the request. Use it to detect success vs. error conditions; see the DataForSEO status-code reference for the full list.
status_code.title_zh: 整个请求的总体状态码。用于判断成功或错误；完整列表见 DataForSEO 状态码参考。

status_message.title_zh: 与总体 `status_code` 对应的可读说明信息。

time.desc_en: Total processing time of the request, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 请求的总处理耗时，单位秒。

cost.desc_en: Total cost of all tasks in this response, in USD.
cost.title_zh: 本次响应中所有任务的总费用，单位美元。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of tasks contained in the `tasks` array.
tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中包含的任务数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: Number of tasks in the `tasks` array that returned an error.
tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中返回错误的任务数量。

tasks.desc_en: Array of task objects, each carrying the status and results of one submitted task.
tasks.title_zh: 任务对象数组，每个元素承载一个已提交任务的状态与结果。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique identifier (UUID) of the task within the DataForSEO system.
tasks.id.title_zh: 任务在 DataForSEO 系统中的唯一标识（UUID）。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Per-task status code (range 10000-60000) indicating how this individual task resolved.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 单个任务的状态码（取值 10000-60000），表示该任务的处理结果。

tasks.status_message.title_zh: 该任务 `status_code` 对应的可读说明信息。

tasks.result.category.desc_en: Name of a supported app category.
tasks.result.category.title_zh: 某个受支持应用分类的名称。

tasks.result.count.desc_en: Number of items returned in this result's `items` array.
tasks.result.count.title_zh: 本结果 `items` 数组中返回的条目数量。

categories.desc_en: App-listing categories used to scope the search; up to 10 may be specified. Fetch valid values from the app-listings categories endpoint.
categories.title_zh: 用于限定搜索范围的应用分类，最多 10 个。可调 app-listings categories 接口获取可用取值。

description.desc_en: Keyword that must appear in the app description (up to 200 chars).
description.title_zh: 必须出现在应用描述中的关键词（上限 200 字符）。

title.desc_en: Keyword that must appear in the app title (up to 200 chars).
title.title_zh: 必须出现在应用标题中的关键词（上限 200 字符）。

filters.desc_en: Array of result-filtering conditions (up to 8), joined by `and`/`or`. Each condition is `[field, operator, value]` (e.g. `["rating.value",">",3]`); operators include comparison, `in`/`not_in`, `like`/`not_like`, `regex`. Fetch supported fields from the available-filters endpoint.
filters.title_zh: 结果过滤条件数组（最多 8 个），用 `and`/`or` 连接。每个条件为 `[字段, 操作符, 值]`（如 `["rating.value",">",3]`）；操作符含比较、`in`/`not_in`、`like`/`not_like`、`regex`。可调 available-filters 接口获取支持的字段。

order_by.desc_en: Result sorting rules using the same fields as `filters`, formatted as `field,asc|desc` (e.g. `["item.rating.value,desc"]`). Up to three rules per request.
order_by.title_zh: 结果排序规则，使用与 `filters` 相同的字段，格式 `字段,asc|desc`（如 `["item.rating.value,desc"]`）。单次请求最多三条。

limit.desc_en: Maximum number of apps to return.

offset.desc_en: Number of leading results to skip in the returned array (e.g. `10` omits the first ten). Recommended only up to ~10,000 results; beyond that use `offset_token`.
offset.title_zh: 返回数组中跳过的前导结果数（如 `10` 略过前十条）。建议仅在约 1 万条以内使用；超出请改用 `offset_token`。

offset_token.desc_en: Pagination token returned in the response of the previous request; pass it back to fetch subsequent results and avoid timeouts on very large result sets. When used, all other parameters must match the previous request, and each token is single-use.
offset_token.title_zh: 上一次请求响应中返回的分页令牌；回传以获取后续结果并避免超大结果集超时。使用时其余参数须与上次请求一致，且每个令牌仅一次性有效。

tag.desc_en: User-defined task label (up to 255 chars) echoed back in the response `data` object, so you can match results to the task you posted.
tag.title_zh: 用户自定义任务标签（上限 255 字符），会在响应 `data` 对象中回显，便于将结果与所提交任务对应。
